title: Real History
content:
**UPDATE:** Steve & Bill [video](http://d5.allthingsd.com/20070530/video-steve-jobs-and-bill-gates-prologue/)!!

[No more Thai Rak Thai](http://www.komchadluek.net/2007/05/31/a001_120817.php?news_id=120817 "ไทยรักไทยถูกยุบ-ปชป.รอด อีก 3 พรรคเล็กโดนเชือดด้วย"), I don't give a damn! (Which, as it turns out, _there are a whole bunch [sore](http://www.urbandictionary.com/define.php?term=sore+loser) [losers](http://www.thairath.co.th/online.php?section=newsthairathonline&content=48970 "'จาตุรนต์' ดิ้นสู้ถูกตัดสิทธิ์ ขัดกฎบัตรสหประชาชาติ")_.)

[This](http://www.engadget.com/2007/05/30/steve-jobs-and-bill-gates-historic-discussion-live-from-d-2007/) is more exciting.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/steve_bill.jpg)

This is a **[REAL HISTORY](http://d5.allthingsd.com/20070530/d5-gates-jobs-interview/)!!!**
